topStories.title: Fed and BoE stay guarded after 100 days of Iran war
topStories.summary: Global central banks are poised to maintain current interest rates this week. The Iran war's impact on inflation and growth remains a key concern. Policymakers are waiting for more data. The Bank of Japan is expected to raise rates. Norway's decision is a close call. The US Federal Reserve and its peers are likely to hold steady.

topStories.title: Govt said to accept tweaks to Securities Markets Code draft

These revisions follow stakeholder consultations and aim to strengthen market regulation.

Concerns are rising about a potential market correction as investor positioning becomes crowded.
